name: PAX Smell Proof Case
summary: The PAX Smell Proof Case is a compact yet reliable solution for storing your stash discreetly.
description: The PAX Smell Proof Case is a compact yet reliable solution for storing your stash discreetly. With its strong materials, it effectively masks the odours of your preferred herbs. The case's convenient pockets keep your devices and accessories organised, while its water-resistant design safeguards your herbs from any spills or damage from moisture. Material : 100% Recycled Ripstop Nylon Dimensions : 5.5”L x 3”W x 1.25”H Capacity : 0.35 Liters Keeps prescribed flower at its best for longer.
